ItacPersonItem.Notes: Also the author of the tragedy `Demetrio. Tragedia di Girolamo Rocco, Accademico Humorista detto l`Ottuso, all`Ill.mo March. Sforza Pallavicino (Rome by Corbelletti, 1628). Censor among the Umoristi in 1638
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
